## Scope

Describe the repository-only change and its intended baseline effect.

## Required checks

- [ ] I preserved the locked MTAW baseline or documented an approved change.
- [ ] I did not add secrets, credentials, private material, evidence, VM
  artifacts, packet captures, database dumps, or large binaries.
- [ ] I ran applicable repository checks and recorded unavailable tools as
  `NOT TESTED`.
- [ ] I labelled incomplete controls as `planned`, `not_implemented`,
  `not_tested`, or `not_validated`.
- [ ] I did not claim workstation, appliance, release, or operational
  validation that has not occurred.
- [ ] I did not add deployment, publishing, signing, release, or OVA-upload
  behavior.
